privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data via setup scripts. The initial file '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/channel_draft.slvs' contains specific incorrect dimensional constraint values (65.0mm, 25.0mm, 32.0mm) that must be updated to the correct values (83.0mm, 18.0mm, 47.0mm) according to the generated specification document. Correct constraints (100.0mm, 80.0mm) are successfully initialized and must be preserved. The verifier validates the values in the modified file '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/channel_corrected.slvs' within a hardcoded tolerance of 0.5mm.
